news.paragraph: Micron is experiencing significant momentum after Bank of America nearly doubled its price target to $950, citing an expanding memory supercycle. While the stock is showing resilience alongside other semiconductor peers, traders should monitor geopolitical developments related to executive visits to China. No immediate earnings or regulatory catalysts are explicitly noted in the recent headlines.
headlines: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Up As Nvidia, Micron Rise; Solar Play Breaks Out (Live Coverage)
